chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Civil Revision Application No.204 of 2010 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 05.11.2025 None is present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation is received. The same was the case on the last of hearing viz: 08.10.2025. On 10.9.2025, Counsel had sought adjournment. But earlier on 24.02.2025, none were present on behalf of applicant. It appears that the applicant has lost interest in the matter. Accordingly, the instant Revision is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
